subcodes.first_line: O spiritual newcomer! Thy letter was received, its contents brought joy to hearts and its meanings were sweet indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نورسیده روحانی نامه ات رسید مضمون سبب مسرت قلوب بود و معانی دلنشین زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
